hero.sub: Boutique consulting for investors entering the Cyprus, Georgia and Dubai property markets. Strategy first — the asset second.

sections.aboutP1: SafeEra is a boutique consulting practice for investors entering property markets in Cyprus, Georgia and Dubai. We start with your objective: capital preservation, first international entry, passive income, or portfolio diversification.
sections.aboutP2: The asset is just an instrument. We own the strategy, the legal logic, the source-of-wealth narrative, and the relationship with the developer after the deal closes. One client — one objective — full guidance.
sections.marketsLead: Each market solves a different investor problem. We only work where we have direct relationships with developers.
sections.servicesTitle: End-to-end — from brief to keys to active management.
sections.ctaSub: Leave your contact — we'll respond within one business day for a complimentary 30-minute consultation.
sections.midsiteTitle: One client. One objective. Full guidance.
sections.midsiteSub: Every step — from the first call to the handover of keys — is carried by the same team. No handoffs, no disappearances.
sections.partnersBody: We work with developers and management companies in every market. Our partners are people we've closed real deals with.
sections.clientFormBody: Leave your contact and a short brief. We'll respond within one business day.
sections.partnerFormBody: If you're a developer or management company — get in touch. We only work with vetted projects.

s01.title: Investment strategy
s01.desc: We define the goal, horizon, risk profile and market before discussing any specific asset.

s02.title: Asset selection
s02.desc: A shortlist of 3–5 options from vetted developers. No mass database, no cold inventory.

s03.title: Legal guidance
s03.desc: Title due diligence, contract, escrow, registration. A bilingual lawyer on the client's side.

s04.title: Tax navigation
s04.desc: Residency-aware structuring, optimisation of CGT and rental income.

s05.title: Capital legalisation
s05.desc: Source-of-wealth packaging to AML standards. Bank-ready, no follow-up questions.

s06.title: Residency / Visa
s06.desc: Cyprus PR, Georgia residency, Dubai Golden Visa — pathway and paperwork mapped to your case.

featureService.title: Asset management
featureService.desc: After the keys, the asset keeps working: management company, transparent income report, renovations, portfolio rebalancing.

w01.title: Your brief first
w01.desc: We don't start with the developer's pitch. We start with what you actually need to solve.

w02.title: Boutique scale
w02.desc: A small concurrent caseload. Each client is owned by a partner — not a call centre.

w03.title: Relationship, not deal
w03.desc: We stay around after close — for the second purchase, for the exit, for the referral.

w04.title: Honesty
w04.desc: If the asset doesn't fit, we say so plainly — even when it's our partner's project.

w05.title: Ukrainian specifics
w05.desc: Capital structuring, currency control, Ukrainian paperwork — handled without surprises.

w06.title: Vetted partners
w06.desc: Every developer has passed our diligence. The list is short — that's the feature, not a bug.

cyprus.name: Cyprus
cyprus.sub: EU jurisdiction. PR from €300k. Stable market with English-language legal system.

georgia.name: Georgia
georgia.sub: The easiest entry into international property — from $50k. High rental yields.

dubai.name: Dubai
dubai.sub: 0% personal income tax. Golden Visa from $545k. Global hub with deep liquidity.

formClient.msgPh: A short brief: goal, budget, horizon...
formClient.policy: By submitting you agree to the processing of personal data.
formClient.successBody: We'll be in touch within one business day.

formPartner.msgPh: Short note: company, current projects, type of collaboration
formPartner.successBody: Thank you. We'll reply within 2 business days.

cy.h1: Cyprus — your asset at the heart of the EU.
cy.lead: Entry from €150k. Permanent Residency from €300k investment + €50k/yr verifiable income. English-language law, stable market, hotel brands on the coast.
cy.whyLead: Cyprus is a full EU member with an English-language Common Law system. That makes the market legible for Ukrainian investors and protected for the long horizon.
cy.typesTitle: What we see on the market.
cy.darkBody: Fast-track Category 6.2: decision in ~2 months. Covers a family of up to 4, including parents and adult dependants.
cy.d1d: Investment of €300,000+ in new property + verified annual income ≥ €50,000 from outside Cyprus.
cy.d2d: Permanent PR, the right to reside in Cyprus, eligibility for citizenship after 5 years of legal residence.
cy.d3d: We package origin-of-capital documents to AML standards so the bank doesn't come back with follow-ups.
cy.d4d: Visit Cyprus at least once every 2 years. The asset cannot be sold while you hold the status.
cy.formBody: Leave your contact — in 30 minutes we'll align your goal with the market and tell you whether Cyprus is the right pick. Complimentary.
cy.b01d: Jurisdiction with European guarantees. Investment protection at the level of EU directives.
cy.b02d: English-language legal system. Contracts and courts in a format global investors understand.
cy.b03d: Marriott, Wyndham, Radisson on the coast — managed-income assets with transparent reporting.
cy.b04d: Become a Cyprus tax resident in 60 days. Low rates on passive income.
cy.b05d: Double-taxation and investment-protection treaties with Ukraine.
cy.b06d: After 5 years of legal residence — eligibility for Cyprus (EU) citizenship.

ge.h1: Georgia — the easiest entry into international property.
ge.lead: From $50k. High short-term rental yields in Batumi and Tbilisi. Residency upon purchase. No restrictions for foreigners.
ge.whyLead: Georgia is the simplest market for a first international purchase. Transparent process, no restrictions on foreigners, short path to income.
ge.darkBody: Ranges based on real partner cases 2024–2025. A specific forecast for your asset is built after shortlist and management-company alignment.
ge.darkDisc: Ranges depend on season, location, management fee and occupancy. Not a yield guarantee.
ge.d1d: Short-term in season + long-term off-season. Gross yield after operating costs.
ge.d2d: Price growth from groundwork to keys (18–36 months) on vetted partner projects.
ge.d3d: We only work with UCs that issue monthly reports, open a bank account, and pay out in the investor's currency.
ge.d4d: Resale on secondary market or transition to passive income — chosen together at the start.
ge.formBody: First step — a 30-minute consultation. We'll say whether Georgia fits your goal and show real cases from the market.
ge.b01d: The lowest entry across our markets. Suits a test entry and portfolio diversification.
ge.b02d: Deal in 5–7 days. No quotas, no foreigner restrictions, no mandatory residency.
ge.b03d: Seasonal rental in Batumi and Tbilisi: 8–12% gross yield on vetted locations.
ge.b04d: Georgia residency — quick process after purchase. No mandatory stay.
ge.b05d: Georgia resident: 5% on rental income, 1% small-business regime. Simple filings.
ge.b06d: English-speaking notaries, escrow, digital registration. Deal flows fast and transparent.

ae.h1: Dubai — tax-free investments in a global hub.
ae.lead: 0% income tax. Golden Visa from $545k. Global hub with a liquid market and world-class branded residences.
ae.whyTitle: A tax-free hub with deep liquidity.
ae.whyLead: Dubai is one of the most liquid real-estate markets in the world. It has grown 15–25% annually since 2020. Suits currency-risk diversification and capital legalisation via Golden Visa.
ae.typesTitle: What we look at in Dubai.
ae.darkBody: The Dubai Golden Visa is the longest residency in the region. Covers the holder, spouse, children of any age, parents and household staff.
ae.d1d: Property investment of AED 2,000,000+ (~$545,000). Single asset or several combined.
ae.d2d: 10 years of residency with automatic renewal. Right to open a business, bank accounts, and sponsor family.
ae.d3d: UAE resident — 0% income tax. Tax-residency certificate after 183 days of presence.
ae.d4d: Cyprus — EU, European guarantees, path to citizenship. Dubai — zero taxes, high yield, no citizenship path.
ae.formBody: Leave your contact — in 30 minutes we'll align your goal with the market. If Dubai isn't the right fit, we'll say so plainly.
ae.b01d: UAE residents pay 0% on salary, dividends, capital gains and rental income.
ae.b02d: One of the most liquid property markets in the world. Sale in 2–8 weeks on hot locations.
ae.b03d: Property price growth of 15–25% annually since 2020. Early-entry edge still holds.
ae.b04d: A hub between Europe, Asia and Africa. 8-hour flight to 2/3 of the world's population.
ae.b05d: Unique concentration of branded projects: Armani, Bulgari, Four Seasons, Ritz-Carlton.
ae.b06d: One of the safest megacities in the world. Stable political regime, transparent market.
